problem_text_cn: 两根相同均匀细杆（质量m、长l）用光滑铰链和线连接，竖直静止在光滑地面，θ₀=30°，剪断细线。1. 求铰链碰地前的速度；2. 求铰链从开始运动到碰地的时间（用积分式表示）。
problem_text_en: Two identical uniform thin rods（mass m、length l）are connected by a smooth hinge and a string, standing vertically at rest on a smooth ground with θ₀=30°，cut the string. 1. Find the velocity of the hinge before hitting the ground；2. Find the time from the start of motion to the hinge hitting the ground（expressed as an integral）.
problem_solution_cn: （1）铰链碰地速度：- 机械能守恒，杆的动能含质心动能和转动动能，积分得ω=√[3g(1-2sinθ)/(2l)]，碰地时θ=0，速度v=lω=√(3gl/2)（向下）。（2）运动时间：- 由dθ/dt=-√[3g(1-2sinθ)/(2l)]，积分得t=√(2l/(3g))∫₀³⁰° dθ/√(1-2sinθ)。
problem_solution_en: （1）Velocity of hinge before hitting the ground：- Conservation of mechanical energy, the rod's kinetic energy includes center-of-mass kinetic energy and rotational kinetic energy. Integrating gives ω=√[3g(1-2sinθ)/(2l)]. When hitting the ground θ=0, velocity v=lω=√(3gl/2)（downward）。（2）Motion time：- From dθ/dt=-√[3g(1-2sinθ)/(2l)]，integrating gives t=√(2l/(3g))∫₀³⁰° dθ/√(1-2sinθ)。
problem_answer: 1. 铰链碰地速度$v=\sqrt{ rac{3gl}{2}{}}$（向下）；2. 运动时间$t=\sqrt{ rac{2l}{3g}{}}\int_{0}^{30^\circ}  rac{d		heta}{\sqrt{1-2\sin		heta}{}}$
